calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850 (A)(3), & 856
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry R. Sykes, via Zoom, for Aldo Congi, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that it has issues with some of her arguments as currently presented. Counsel offers advocacy on behalf of her client's petition. The court advises that it intends to take the matter under submission to review the file and to consider her testimony provided at today's hearing.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
